maintenance.title: Under maintenance
maintenance.body: Hide & Seek is briefly offline for maintenance. We'll be back shortly — this screen clears automatically once we're up again.

wizard.title: New game
wizard.cityHint: The play size and available transit are tied to the city.
wizard.transitHint: The stop types available in {{ city }} — tap the ones you'll use.
wizard.transitNeedOne: Pick at least one transit mode.
wizard.deckHint: Remove any you don't want — the hider draws from these. Everything's in by default.
wizard.readyHint: Check it over, then create the game.
wizard.revealHint: Casual mode — off for a faithful game.
wizard.exitBody: Your new-game settings will be lost. Sure you want to leave?
wizard.endgameQHint: Seekers can keep asking questions during the endgame.

auth.loginTagline: Log in to pick up where you left off.
auth.registerBlurb: Keep your games, stats and name across devices. You can keep playing as a guest without one.
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
auth.guestUpsell: You're playing as a guest. Create an account to keep your history and play across devices.
auth.deleteExplain: Permanently delete your account and personal data. Your game history is anonymised for other players; this cannot be undone.
auth.deleteConfirm: Enter your password to permanently delete your account.
auth.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete your account. Check your password and try again.
auth.forgotBlurb: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.
auth.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.resetDone: Your password has been reset. You can log in now.

stats.title: Stats
stats.none: No finished games yet — play one to build your stats.

content.title: My content
content.blurb: Your custom curses + questions appear only in the games you host.

hider.title: Find your hiding spot
hider.subtitle: Hide near a station — we'll find the closest one to you.
hider.waitingGps: Waiting for your GPS location — enable location to find the nearest station.
hider.none: No stations found nearby. Move closer to a station.
hider.relocateTravel: Travel to a new area, then pick a station below to hide at.
hider.roamHint: Move freely anywhere inside your hiding zone — your spot only locks when a seeker reaches you.
hider.lockedHint: The endgame has started — stay exactly where you are until you're found.

draw.title: You drew {{ drew }} — keep {{ keep }}
draw.tap: Tap the cards you want to keep.

discard.title: Discard {{ need }} card(s)
discard.tap: Tap the cards to discard from your hand, then confirm.

landing.tagline: Hide across the city. Hunt with questions. Outlast everyone.
landing.transportHint: Denser networks (e.g. bus) make smaller hiding zones.
landing.revealSeekers: Show seeker positions to the hider
landing.revealSeekersHint: Off = faithful (the hider can't see the seekers closing in). On = casual.
landing.joinFailed: Could not join — check the code.
landing.newGameBody: You already have an active game. Start a new one anyway?

lobby.title: Waiting room
lobby.share: Share the code or link to invite players.
lobby.waiting: Waiting for the host to start…

host.tapOrRandom: Tap a player, or roll a random one.

endGame.title: End the game?
endGame.body: This ends the game for everyone and shows the results.

results.nextHint: Use the button below to start the next round.

categoryHint.radar: Are you within a distance of me?
categoryHint.thermometer: Hotter or colder as I travel?
categoryHint.matching: Is your nearest place the same as mine?
categoryHint.measuring: Closer or further from a place than me?
categoryHint.tentacles: Which nearby place are you closest to?

seeker.claimPending: Waiting for the hider to confirm you caught them…
seeker.voidedNotice: Your last question couldn't be answered — ask again.
seeker.vetoedNotice: The hider vetoed your question — ask another.
seeker.endgameClose: Endgame — close in on the hider to catch them.
seeker.thermoTravel: Travel about {{ dist }}, then stop — the hider will see your start → end.
seeker.blocked: A curse is blocking questions — clear it below to ask again.
seeker.waitingAnswer: Waiting for the hider to answer…
seeker.needLocation: Wait for your location to load first — questions are measured from your position.
seeker.noQuestions: No questions asked yet — tap “Ask a question”.

hangman.solveToAsk: Solve the word to ask again!

deck.pickDisable: Pick {{ count }} question categories to disable
deck.streetView: Send the seekers a Street View screenshot — they must find it.
deck.hangmanWord: Think of a word for the seekers to guess:
deck.hangmanHint: Letters only, 4–16 characters. The seekers can't see it — they play hangman against it.
deck.takePhoto: Take or pick a photo to send back.
deck.whichNearest: Which of these is your nearest? Tap it.
deck.outOfRangeNone: Out of range — none of these
deck.misTapped: Mis-tapped? You can still change it.
deck.curseNudge: Play a curse to slow the seekers.
deck.foundClaim: {{ name }} says they found you! Confirm to end the round.
deck.noCards: No cards yet — you draw cards as the seekers ask questions.
deck.promptMatching: Is the seeker's closest place also your nearest?
deck.promptMeasuring: Compared to the seeker, are you closer to or further from it?
deck.promptTentacles: Are you within the question's range of one of the seeker's nearby places?

picker.whichClosest: Which {{ label }} is closest to you?
picker.radarHint: Pick a radius to preview it on the map, then confirm to ask.
picker.travelHint: Pick how far you'll travel, then start — stop once you've moved that far.

map.fitTitle: Fit the deduced area on screen

annot.radarIn: Hider within {{ dist }} of here → kept this circle
annot.radarOut: Hider beyond {{ dist }} from here → removed this circle
annot.thermoWarm: Hider got warmer moving this way → kept the half toward here
annot.thermoCold: Hider got colder moving this way → kept the half behind the start
annot.tentOut: Hider outside this {{ dist }} ring → removed it
annot.tentInPlace: Hider's nearest is {{ place }} → kept {{ place }}'s area
annot.tentIn: Hider in range → kept that cell
annot.measCloser: Hider closer to {{ place }} than you → kept inside that ring
annot.measFurther: Hider further from {{ place }} than you → kept outside that ring
annot.matchSameZone: Same {{ zone }} as you → kept that {{ zone }}
annot.matchSamePlace: Same nearest place ({{ place }}) → kept the area around it
annot.matchSame: Same nearest place → kept that area
annot.matchDiffPlace: Hider's nearest isn't {{ place }} → removed the area around it
annot.matchDiff: Different nearest place → removed that area

statusHint.role_assignment: Waiting for the host to assign roles…
statusHint.hiding: The hider is choosing a spot…
statusHint.seeking: Seekers are hunting — answer their questions and play curses.

transit.title: Transit
transit.onboardNote: The thermometer must be walked, so it's unavailable until you get off.
transit.pickLine: Tap a line to draw its route, then board.

intro.hiderGoal: Stay hidden as long as you can — that's your score.
intro.hiderAction: Hide near a station, then answer questions and play curses to slow the seekers.
intro.seekerGoal: Find the hider as fast as you can.
intro.seekerAction: Ask questions to shrink the map, then ride toward the hider and catch them.

objective.hider_hiding: Hide near a station and confirm your spot.
objective.hider_seeking: Stay hidden — answer questions and play curses to slow them.
objective.hider_endgame: Stay hidden — the seekers are closing in!
objective.seeker_hiding: The hider is hiding — get ready.
objective.seeker_seeking: Ask questions to shrink the map, then ride toward the hider.
objective.seeker_endgame: Final approach — reach the hider to catch them.

howto.title: How to play
howto.goal: One player hides, the rest seek. The hider's score is how long they survive; over several rounds, the longest survivor wins.
howto.hider: Hide near a transit station. Answer questions truthfully — but every question the seekers ask hands you a card. Play curses to slow them and bank time bonuses.
howto.seeker: Ask questions to rule out parts of the map, then ride transit toward what's left. When close, declare endgame and reach the hider to catch them.
howto.newHudHint: Try the new, cleaner HUD. You can switch back any time.

home.title: Hide & Seek — hide and seek across the city
home.desc: Real-time, location-based hide-and-seek across Hungarian cities. One hider hides; seekers narrow down the location with questions while the hider slows them with curses.

map.title: Map — Hide & Seek
map.desc: Interactive map for the Hide & Seek game.

push.title: Notifications
push.blurb: Push notifications for key game events on this device.
push.blocked: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
push.nudgeBody: Get alerted about questions, curses and game events even when the app is in the background.

install.title: Install the app
install.blurb: Add it to your home screen for quick access.
install.iosHint: Tap the Share icon, then "Add to Home Screen".

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.message: Tell us what happened or what you'd suggest…
feedback.contact: Email (optional, if you'd like a reply)

found.title: A seeker found you!
found.body: A seeker claims they found you.

geo.title: Share your location
geo.body: Everyone needs to share their location to play — it's how the game tracks the hider and the seekers. Allow location access to continue.
geo.deniedBody: Location is blocked in this browser. You need to allow it to play.
geo.deniedHint: Open the lock icon in the address bar (or the site settings) and set Location to “Allow” — the game will continue automatically.
